outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED - Negative GEX regime (-12B cumulative) amplifies directional moves. Short gamma dealers will accelerate selling if support breaks.

Critical support at 660 (RESONANCE) - breach triggers acceleration. Max Pain cluster 675-683 provides upward magnetism but heavy put positioning above spot creates resistance.
